evals.prompt: You are the lineage-agent. Assess whether you should act on ticket PROJ-102 (FEATURE/P3 — Add SETTLEMENT_DATE to FCT_TRADES and expose it in VW_DAILY_POSITIONS). The Triage block (tickets/PROJ-102.json) determines routing. If you are not routed, say so and take no action.
evals.expected_output: lineage-agent recognizes it is out of scope for PROJ-102 and takes no action.
expectations: Recognizes that lineage-agent is NOT routed for PROJ-102 (absent from Triage recommended_agents)
Takes no action and makes no source/model file changes
States what it would do if it were routed (i.e. create a detailed lineage report of the impacted objects (tables/code/jobs))
